description_long: This is a sturdy, rectangular toolbox with a dark blue hard plastic exterior and reinforced edges. The lid features a central, rectangular metallic handle that is likely foldable for easy carrying and storage. Two robust metal latches secure the lid to the base, ensuring the contents remain safe during transport. The front face displays a white pictogram of crossed tools, indicating its intended use for tool storage. The box has molded side handles for additional grip and maneuverability. The overall design suggests durability and practicality for use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A dark blue, hard plastic toolbox with a central metallic handle, metal latches, and a white tool pictogram on the front. It is robust and designed for secure tool storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic handle, two metal latches, and a white crossed-tools pictogram.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the molded side handle and the reinforced lid edges.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible latches or pictograms, showing the plain back and lid contours.
description_view_3: Right side view with a molded handle and clear view of the lid's geometric reinforcement.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, metallic, folding handle mounted centrally on the lid; ergonomic grip, designed for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches, likely snap-type, securing the lid to the base.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers from the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: White crossed-tools pictogram on the front face.
